subject: A large red dinosaur is attacked by spectral undead creatures in a dark cavern
description: A large, bipedal red dinosaur — likely a theropod — stands on a rocky ledge in a dark underground cavern, mouth open in a roar or cry. Around it, three spectral figures attack or cling to it: one large ghost-like form with flowing dark tendrils wraps around the dinosaur from the upper left; a smaller spectral figure with glowing blue energy clings to the lower left; another small spectral wisp attacks from the lower right, glowing with pink-purple energy. The cavern walls are rocky and dark, with stalactites or stone formations in the background. The overall palette is cool and gloomy — deep cave darkness contrasted against the warm russet of the dinosaur and the eerie cool glow of the spirits.
foreground: Red theropod dinosaur surrounded and harassed by multiple spectral undead entities
background: Dark underground cavern with rocky formations and stalactites
emotion: Terror and overwhelm — the dinosaur is cornered, the spirits pressing in from every angle
